structure.questionText: The North Platte River ______ from Wyoming into Nebraska.
structure.explanation: Kalimat ini membutuhkan kata kerja utama (main verb). 'Flows' adalah satu-satunya kata kerja tunggal yang tepat untuk subjek 'The North Platte River'.

structure.questionText: ______ Biloxi received its name from a Sioux word meaning 'first people'.
structure.explanation: Kalimat ini membutuhkan subjek. 'The city of' melengkapi subjek 'Biloxi' menjadi frasa benda yang utuh.

structure.questionText: A pride of lions ______ up to forty lions, including one to three males, several females, and cubs.
structure.explanation: Subjek kalimat adalah 'A pride' (tunggal). 'Can contain' adalah kata kerja modal yang benar.

structure.questionText: ______ tea plant are small and white.
structure.explanation: Predikatnya adalah 'are' (jamak), jadi subjeknya harus jamak. 'The flowers of the' menyediakan subjek jamak ('flowers').

structure.questionText: The tetracyclines, ______ antibiotics, are used to treat infections.
structure.explanation: Ini adalah bentuk Appositive. Struktur yang benar adalah 'Subject, Appositive, Verb'. 'A family of' berfungsi sebagai appositive.

structure.questionText: Any possible academic assistance from taking stimulants ______ marginal at best.
structure.explanation: Subjek utamanya adalah 'Any possible academic assistance' (tunggal). Maka kata kerjanya adalah 'is'.

structure.questionText: Henry Adams, born in Boston, ______ famous as a historian and novelist.
structure.explanation: Kalimat ini sudah memiliki subjek 'Henry Adams' dan modifier. Yang dibutuhkan hanya kata kerja utama: 'became'.

structure.questionText: The major cause ______ the pull of the Moon on the Earth.
options: of the tides in the ocean
structure.explanation: Struktur kalimat: Subject + Verb + Object. 'The major cause of ocean tides' adalah subjek lengkap, dan 'is' adalah kata kerjanya.

structure.questionText: Still a novelty in the late nineteenth century, ______ limited to the rich.
structure.explanation: Frasa di awal adalah modifier. Setelah koma, harus diikuti langsung oleh subjek yang dijelaskan (photography) lalu kata kerja (was).

structure.questionText: A computerized map of the freeways using information gathered by sensors ______ on a local cable channel during rush hours.
structure.explanation: Subjek utamanya adalah 'A computerized map' (tunggal). Maka kata kerjanya harus tunggal: 'airs'.

structure.questionText: Usually, the more skilled an athlete, ______ more money he or she earns.
structure.explanation: Ini adalah bentuk 'Double Comparative': The more..., the more... (Semakin..., semakin...).

structure.questionText: ______ the mass of the object is difficult without a scale.
structure.explanation: Infinitive 'To determine' dapat berfungsi sebagai subjek kalimat.

structure.questionText: The reactor core of a nuclear power plant is enclosed in concrete ______ radiation.
structure.explanation: Gunakan 'to + verb' (infinitive of purpose) untuk menunjukkan tujuan. 'To prevent' (untuk mencegah).

structure.questionText: ______ political party in the United States.
structure.explanation: 'No' digunakan sebelum kata benda (noun phrase) untuk menunjukkan ketiadaan.

structure.questionText: The committee has met and ______.
structure.explanation: 'The committee' dianggap tunggal (collective noun), jadi gunakan 'it'. Struktur harus paralel: 'has met and (has) reached'.

structure.questionText: Alfred Adams has not ______ lived lonely in times of sorrow.
structure.explanation: Pola 'not only... but also'. Di sini konteksnya mengarah pada 'not only'.

structure.questionText: Juana Ines de la Cruz ______ a nun in 1667 to devote her life to writing.
structure.explanation: Dibutuhkan kata kerja utama bentuk lampau (past tense) untuk subjek 'Juana Ines de la Cruz'. Jawabannya 'became'.

structure.questionText: A premise is a statement ______ as a basis for reasoning.
structure.explanation: Ini adalah reduksi dari adjective clause 'which serves'. Menjadi 'serving' (Active participle).

structure.questionText: Of all the cereals, rice is the one ______ food for more people than any other grain.
structure.explanation: Dibutuhkan relative pronoun 'that' + verb untuk menjelaskan 'the one'.

structure.questionText: ______ wooden buildings helps to protect them from damage due to weather.
structure.explanation: Gerund ('Painting') dapat berfungsi sebagai subjek kalimat.

structure.questionText: Not only ______ shade and beauty, but they also reduce carbon dioxide.
structure.explanation: Jika kalimat dimulai dengan 'Not only', maka harus terjadi Inversi (Auxiliary + Subject + Verb). 'Do trees provide' adalah inversi yang benar.

structure.questionText: ______ in the atmosphere is the temperature falling below freezing.
structure.explanation: Noun clause 'What produces frost' berfungsi sebagai subjek kalimat.

structure.questionText: Lambert's sunfish, a small freshwater fish, ______ for the distinctive red spot on its ear.
structure.explanation: Kalimat pasif. Ikan tersebut 'dinamai' (is named).

structure.questionText: Unless protected areas are established, the Bengal tiger ______ extinct.
structure.explanation: Conditional sentence. 'Might become' menunjukkan kemungkinan di masa depan.

structure.questionText: Before the 1800s, ______ of cotton was done by hand.
structure.explanation: Dibutuhkan noun phrase sebagai subjek. 'The picking' (proses pemetikan) adalah yang paling tepat.

structure.questionText: Unlike the Earth, which rotates once every twenty-four hours, ______ once every ten hours.
structure.explanation: Setelah frasa pembanding 'Unlike...', harus diikuti oleh subjek yang dibandingkan (Jupiter) dan kata kerja (rotates).

structure.questionText: Jacksonville, Florida, ______ to be the largest city in the United States.
structure.explanation: Subjek 'Jacksonville' membutuhkan kata kerja utama. 'Claims' adalah simple present tense yang tepat.

structure.questionText: The skull of a mammal ______ of different bones.
structure.explanation: Kalimat pasif. Tengkorak 'is made up of' (terdiri dari/dibuat dari) tulang.

structure.questionText: Using a globe can be ______ to visualize the geography of the world.
structure.explanation: Dalam konteks ini, seringkali membandingkan dengan metode lain (implisit), jadi comparative 'easier' sering digunakan.

structure.questionText: Only when the ground is kept moist ______ germinate.
structure.explanation: Kalimat dimulai dengan 'Only when...', menuntut Inversi di klausa utama: Auxiliary (will) + Subject (grass seeds).

structure.questionText: ______ widely used in the chemical industry, sodium carbonate is a principal ingredient in soap.
structure.explanation: Dibutuhkan konjungsi. 'Though (it is) widely used...'.

structure.questionText: Glass that has been tempered may be up to ______.
options: five times as hard as ordinary glass
as hard as ordinary glass five times
harder as ordinary glass five times
ordinary glass as hard as five times
structure.explanation: Urutan perbandingan: Multiple number + times + as + adjective + as + noun.

structure.questionText: Arizona ______ a very dry climate.
structure.explanation: Kalimat sederhana Subject + Verb. Arizona has (memiliki).

structure.questionText: One of the most important tools ______ by geologists is the hammer.
structure.explanation: Reduced adjective clause. Aslinya: '...tools (which are) used by...'.

structure.questionText: Native American languages are often ______ than European languages.
structure.explanation: Comparative adjective. Karena ada 'than', gunakan 'more complex'.

structure.questionText: Duncan Mayo, ______ of the early west, was actually born in Scotland.
structure.explanation: Appositive phrase. Menjelaskan subjek 'Duncan Mayo' tanpa perlu kata kerja baru.

structure.questionText: X-rays are able to pass through objects ______ visible light cannot.
structure.explanation: Relative clause menjelaskan 'objects'. 'That' digunakan sebagai konektor/objek.

structure.questionText: ______ to the Moon, the Apollo astronauts took many photographs.
structure.explanation: Frasa preposisi 'On their way to the Moon' berfungsi sebagai keterangan yang tepat.

structure.questionText: Gunpowder, in some ways the most effective of all the explosive substances, ______ a mixture of potassium nitrate, charcoal, and sulfur.
structure.explanation: Subjeknya 'Gunpowder' (tunggal/uncountable), jadi verb-nya 'is'.

structure.questionText: If water is heated to 212 degrees Fahrenheit, ______ as steam.
structure.explanation: Conditional sentence type 0/1 (General truth). Subject (it) + Verb (boils).

structure.questionText: The higher the temperature of a molecule, ______.
structure.explanation: Double Comparative. Pola 'The more..., the more...'. Jawaban yang tepat mengikuti pola 'the + comparative + subject + verb'.

structure.questionText: ______ related to the hippopotamus, the whale is a mammal.
structure.explanation: Reduced Adjective Clause/Conjunction. Kalimat lengkapnya 'Although (it is) related...'. 'Despite' harus diikuti noun phrase, sedangkan 'related' adalah participle.

structure.questionText: ______ in 1776, the Declaration of Independence is one of the most important documents in US history.
structure.explanation: Past Participle Phrase. Dokumen tersebut 'ditulis' (pasif), jadi gunakan V3 (Written) di awal kalimat sebagai modifier.

structure.questionText: Only after food has been dried ______ stored for later consumption.
structure.explanation: Inversion. Kalimat diawali dengan 'Only after...', maka klausa utama harus diinversi (Auxiliary + Subject + Verb).

structure.questionText: The giant panda is ______ to become extinct.
structure.explanation: Passive Voice / Adjective. 'Threatened' (terancam) paling tepat secara gramatikal dan makna. Jika pakai 'danger', harusnya 'in danger of becoming'.

structure.questionText: Neptune is ______ any other planet in the solar system.
structure.explanation: Comparative. Dibutuhkan struktur perbandingan lengkap: 'further... than'.

structure.questionText: ______ is the study of the nervous system.
structure.explanation: Missing Subject. Kalimat membutuhkan subjek tunggal. 'Neurology' adalah subjek yang tepat.

structure.questionText: Generally, the knifefish ______ electric fields to navigate.
structure.explanation: Subject-Verb Agreement. Subjek 'the knifefish' (sebagai spesies tunggal) membutuhkan verb tunggal 'uses'.

structure.questionText: The seed of the flax plant ______ oil.
structure.explanation: Subject-Verb Agreement. Subjek intinya adalah 'seed' (tunggal), bukan 'plants'. Jadi verb-nya 'yields'.

structure.questionText: ______ a busy city, Pompeii was destroyed by the eruption of Mount Vesuvius.
structure.explanation: Appositive/Modifier. 'Once a busy city' berfungsi menjelaskan subjek 'Pompeii'.

structure.questionText: It is essential that every student ______ the exam rules.
structure.explanation: Subjunctive. Setelah 'essential that', verb harus dalam bentuk dasar (bare infinitive) untuk semua subjek.

structure.questionText: ______ determines the color of the eggshell is the breed of the hen.
structure.explanation: Noun Clause Subject. 'What determines...' adalah klausa yang berfungsi sebagai subjek kalimat.

structure.questionText: Not until the 20th century ______ widely understood.
structure.explanation: Inversion. 'Not until' di awal kalimat memicu inversi (Auxiliary + Subject). 'Was quantum mechanics'.

structure.questionText: ______ rapid spread of the disease was alarming.
structure.explanation: Missing Article. Dibutuhkan determiner untuk noun phrase 'rapid spread'. 'The' paling spesifik.

structure.questionText: Certain layers of the atmosphere allow radio waves ______ around the Earth.
structure.explanation: Infinitive. Pola 'allow + object + to infinitive'. Jadi 'allow... to travel'.

structure.questionText: ______ virtually no atmosphere on the Moon.
structure.explanation: Existential Sentence. 'Atmosphere' adalah uncountable (tunggal), jadi gunakan 'There is'.

structure.questionText: The first steam engine, ______ by James Watt, revolutionized industry.
structure.explanation: Reduced Adjective Clause. Aslinya 'which was developed'. Disingkat menjadi 'developed' (Past Participle).

structure.questionText: ______ gene in the human genome has a specific function.
structure.explanation: Quantifier. 'Gene' adalah singular noun. 'Every' diikuti singular noun, sedangkan opsi lain diikuti plural/uncountable.

structure.questionText: Prior to ______ the United States, immigrants must obtain a visa.
structure.explanation: Preposition + Gerund. Setelah preposisi 'to' (dalam frasa 'prior to'), gunakan V-ing.

structure.questionText: Of the two cars, the red one is ______.
structure.explanation: Comparative with 'The'. Jika hanya ada dua benda, gunakan 'the + comparative' (the faster).

structure.questionText: Rarely ______ seen such a beautiful sunset.
structure.explanation: Inversion. Adverb negatif 'Rarely' di awal kalimat memicu inversi. Gunakan 'have I' (Present Perfect).

structure.questionText: ______ is necessary for the body to function properly.
structure.explanation: Subject Selection. 'Sleep' (noun) adalah subjek yang paling natural dan ringkas di sini.

structure.questionText: The manager asked that the report ______ submitted by 5 PM.
structure.explanation: Subjunctive. Setelah 'asked that', verb harus bare infinitive ('be').

structure.questionText: ______ built in 1883, the Brooklyn Bridge is an engineering marvel.
structure.explanation: Reduced Clause. 'Although (it was) built...'. Ini menunjukkan pertentangan (tua tapi hebat).

structure.questionText: Neither the teacher nor the students ______ the answer.
structure.explanation: Subject-Verb Agreement. Dalam 'Neither...nor', verb mengikuti subjek terdekat ('students' = jamak). Jadi 'know'.

structure.questionText: The surface of Mars is covered with ______ red dust.
structure.explanation: Zero Article. 'Dust' adalah uncountable noun dan di sini bersifat umum, jadi tidak butuh artikel.

structure.questionText: Had I known about the traffic, I ______ earlier.
structure.explanation: Conditional Type 3. 'Had I known' = 'If I had known'. Result clause harus 'would have + V3'.

structure.questionText: ______ dolphins have no sense of smell is known to marine biologists.
structure.explanation: Noun Clause Subject. 'That dolphins have...' adalah klausa yang berfungsi sebagai subjek kalimat.

structure.questionText: The speed of light is ______ the speed of sound.
structure.explanation: Comparative. Dibutuhkan struktur komparatif lengkap 'much faster than'.

structure.questionText: Proteins are ______ of amino acids.
structure.explanation: Passive Voice. 'Are composed of' = terdiri dari.

structure.questionText: ______ rain, the picnic was canceled.
structure.explanation: Preposition. 'Rain' adalah noun. Gunakan 'Due to' (preposisi). Opsi lain adalah conjunction yang harus diikuti klausa.

structure.questionText: Most of the water on Earth ______ in the oceans.
structure.explanation: Subject-Verb Agreement. 'Water' adalah uncountable (tunggal). Jadi 'is'.

structure.questionText: Using a telescope, ______.
structure.explanation: Dangling Modifier. Frasa 'Using a telescope' harus diikuti oleh pelaku yang menggunakan teleskop tersebut ('we').

structure.questionText: ______ the fact that he was tired, he continued working.
structure.explanation: Preposition. 'Despite' diikuti noun phrase ('the fact that...').

structure.questionText: Mathematics ______ my favorite subject in school.
structure.explanation: Singular Noun. 'Mathematics' berakhiran 's' tapi tunggal. Gunakan 'was'.

structure.questionText: ______ a large amount of money was stolen from the bank.
structure.explanation: Adverb Modifier. 'Reportedly' memodifikasi seluruh kalimat/kata kerja.

structure.questionText: The cactus is a plant ______ adapted to dry conditions.
structure.explanation: Adverb usage. Participle 'adapted' harus dijelaskan oleh adverb 'well', bukan adjective 'good'.

structure.questionText: Unless ______, I will not go to the party.
structure.explanation: Reduced Clause. 'Unless (I am) invited...'. Gunakan Past Participle untuk makna pasif.

structure.questionText: ______ the best player on the team, Sarah was elected captain.
structure.explanation: Present Participle Phrase. 'Being the best player...' menjelaskan subjek 'Sarah'.

structure.questionText: The committee ______ usually hold their meetings on Tuesdays.
structure.explanation: Collective Noun. Di sini ada kata ganti 'their', menunjukkan anggota komite dianggap jamak (individuals). Maka gunakan 'do'.

structure.questionText: ______, penicillin is known as the first antibiotic.
structure.explanation: Frasa 'Discovered by Fleming' adalah past participle phrase yang berfungsi menjelaskan subjek 'penicillin'. Struktur ini benar untuk melengkapi kalimat.

structure.questionText: It is important that he ______ the doctor immediately.
structure.explanation: Subjunctive. Setelah 'important that', gunakan bare infinitive 'see'.

structure.questionText: The Statue of Liberty was a gift ______ friendship from France.
structure.explanation: Preposition. 'A gift of friendship' (hadiah persahabatan).

structure.questionText: ______ manufacturing, the country relies on agriculture.
structure.explanation: Prepositional Phrase. 'In addition to' (Selain) cocok secara makna dan gramatikal.

structure.questionText: Birds regulate their body temperature ______ feathers.
structure.explanation: Method. 'By + Gerund' digunakan untuk menunjukkan cara melakukan sesuatu.

structure.questionText: ______ appears to be no solution to the problem.
structure.explanation: Existential Subject. 'There appears to be...' adalah bentuk formal dari 'There is...'.

structure.questionText: The Mona Lisa is ______ painting in the world.
structure.explanation: Superlative. Dibutuhkan 'the most + adjective' untuk superlatif.

structure.questionText: ______ classified as a dwarf planet, Pluto has five known moons.
structure.explanation: Reduced Clause. 'Although (it is) classified...'.

structure.questionText: The more you learn, ______ you realize how little you know.
structure.explanation: Double Comparative. 'The more..., the more...'.

structure.questionText: ______ tea is the second most consumed drink in the world.
structure.explanation: Prepositional Phrase. 'After water' memberikan konteks urutan.

structure.questionText: The knee is the joint ______ the thigh bone meets the large bone of the lower leg.
structure.explanation: Relative Adverb. 'Where' digunakan untuk merujuk pada tempat atau lokasi fisik (persendian).

structure.questionText: ______ produce artificial rain, chemicals are spread by airplanes.
structure.explanation: Infinitive of Purpose. Gunakan 'To + Verb 1' di awal kalimat untuk menyatakan tujuan. 'To produce...'.

structure.questionText: If the oxygen supply in the atmosphere ______ replenished by plants, it would soon be exhausted.
structure.explanation: Conditional Sentence Type 2. Untuk pengandaian yang berlawanan dengan fakta saat ini, gunakan 'were' untuk semua subjek.

structure.questionText: ______ excellent art museums, Moscow has a world-famous ballet company.
structure.explanation: Connector. Kalimat ini menambahkan informasi positif (museum + ballet), jadi 'In addition to' adalah yang paling tepat.

structure.questionText: The onion is characterized by a strong sharp smell and taste ______.
structure.explanation: Reduced Adjective Clause. Aslinya 'which is caused by'. Disingkat menjadi Past Participle 'caused by'.

structure.questionText: Not only ______ atoms, but they also contain subatomic particles.
structure.explanation: Inversion. 'Not only' di awal kalimat mengharuskan inversi (Auxiliary + Subject + Verb).

structure.questionText: Generally, the thinnest part of the Earth's crust is ______ the oceans.
structure.explanation: Preposition. Dibutuhkan preposisi sederhana 'under' untuk menunjukkan lokasi.

structure.questionText: ______ two fingerprints have ever been found to be exactly the same.
structure.explanation: Negative Adjective. 'No' digunakan sebelum noun phrase ('two fingerprints').

structure.questionText: Computers that once took up entire rooms are now ______ to put on desktops.
structure.explanation: Adjective + Enough. Posisi 'enough' selalu diletakkan SETELAH kata sifat.

structure.questionText: ______ fats are essential to the human body, but too much can be harmful.
structure.explanation: Adjective/Subject Modifier. Dibutuhkan kata sifat untuk menjelaskan 'fats'. 'Dietary fats' (lemak makanan).

structure.questionText: The hard palate ______ between the mouth and the nose.
structure.explanation: Missing Verb. Kalimat ini sudah punya subjek 'The hard palate', butuh verb utama 'forms'.

structure.questionText: ______ the history of the tough, strong-willed Nebraska farmer.
structure.explanation: Simple Sentence. Dibutuhkan Subjek dan Verb. 'Willa Cather (S) wrote (V)'.

structure.questionText: Never before ______ seen such a rapid increase in technology.
structure.explanation: Inversion. Adverb negatif 'Never before' memicu inversi. Gunakan Present Perfect 'has the world'.

structure.questionText: ______ for their strong fiber include flax and hemp.
structure.explanation: Reduced Adjective Clause. Subjek kalimat adalah 'Plants (which are) grown for their strong fiber'. Verb utamanya adalah 'include'.

structure.questionText: ______ is the chemical element with the symbol Au.
structure.explanation: Simple Subject. Kalimat membutuhkan subjek noun 'Gold'.

structure.questionText: In the United States, ______ is the most common form of energy.
structure.explanation: Subject. Setelah frasa preposisi tempat, dibutuhkan subjek untuk verb 'is'. 'Electricity'.

structure.questionText: The Eiffel Tower is ______ famous landmark in Paris.
structure.explanation: Article. 'Famous' diawali bunyi konsonan, gunakan 'a'. Ini adalah penyebutan umum salah satu landmark.

structure.questionText: ______ she was tired, she finished the marathon.
structure.explanation: Conjunction. Diikuti klausa lengkap (S + V), gunakan 'Although'. 'Despite' untuk noun phrase.

structure.questionText: The study of rocks is ______ geology.
structure.explanation: Passive Voice. 'Is called' (disebut).

structure.questionText: ______ birds are able to fly, the ostrich cannot.
structure.explanation: Conjunction. 'While' menunjukkan pertentangan (Sementara kebanyakan burung bisa terbang...).

structure.questionText: ______ air is composed of nitrogen and oxygen.
structure.explanation: Zero Article. 'Air' adalah uncountable noun yang bersifat umum di sini.

structure.questionText: Only by working hard ______ achieve your goals.
structure.explanation: Inversion. 'Only by...' memicu inversi (Auxiliary + S + V).

structure.questionText: The Appalachian Mountains are ______ than the Rocky Mountains.
structure.explanation: Comparative. Adjective pendek + er + than.

structure.questionText: ______ gene in the body is unique.
structure.explanation: Quantifier. 'Gene' tunggal, jadi gunakan 'Each'. Yang lain untuk jamak.

structure.questionText: Before ______ to bed, I always brush my teeth.
structure.explanation: Preposition + Gerund. 'Before going'.

structure.questionText: ______ of the students passed the exam.
structure.explanation: Pronoun. 'None of the students' (tak satu pun). 'Every' tidak bisa diikuti 'of' secara langsung (harus 'Every one of'). 'Each of' benar tapi biasanya menekankan individu, 'None' lebih umum untuk negasi jamak di sini.

structure.questionText: The speed of sound is ______ than the speed of light.
structure.explanation: Comparative. 'Slower than'.

structure.questionText: ______ mammals, whales breathe air.
structure.explanation: Preposition. 'Like' (seperti) digunakan untuk membandingkan noun.

structure.questionText: It is essential that she ______ on time.
structure.explanation: Subjunctive. 'Essential that she be'.

structure.questionText: The sun ______ in the east.
structure.explanation: Simple Present Tense. General truth, subjek tunggal.

structure.questionText: ______ is a popular sport in Brazil.
structure.explanation: Zero Article. Nama olahraga tidak menggunakan artikel.

structure.questionText: The man ______ to the manager is my uncle.
structure.explanation: Reduced Adjective Clause. 'The man (who is) talking...'.

structure.questionText: ______ help you?
structure.explanation: Question Form. Modal + Subject + Verb.

structure.questionText: She is ______ intelligent student.
structure.explanation: Article. 'Intelligent' diawali bunyi vokal.

structure.questionText: ______ I know the answer, I cannot tell you.
structure.explanation: Conjunction. Menunjukkan pertentangan (Walaupun saya tahu...).

structure.questionText: The river ______ through the city.
structure.explanation: Simple Present. Subjek tunggal 'The river'.

structure.questionText: ______ I have a pen?
structure.explanation: Polite Request. 'May I have...'.

structure.questionText: The book ______ by Mark Twain.
structure.explanation: Passive Voice. Past Tense (was + V3).

structure.questionText: ______ students are in the classroom.
structure.explanation: Quantifier. 'Students' adalah countable plural. Gunakan 'Many'.

structure.questionText: I ______ to the store yesterday.
structure.explanation: Simple Past. Keterangan waktu 'yesterday'.

structure.questionText: The phone ______ while I was sleeping.
structure.explanation: Simple Past (interrupted action). 'Rang'.

structure.questionText: ______ car is parked outside?
structure.explanation: Possessive Question. 'Mobil siapa...'. Gunakan 'Whose'.

structure.questionText: He is ______ interesting person.
structure.explanation: Article. 'An interesting person'.

structure.questionText: They ______ soccer every weekend.
structure.explanation: Simple Present. Subjek 'They' jamak.

structure.questionText: ______ time is it?
structure.explanation: Question. 'What time...'.

structure.questionText: I ______ seen that movie before.
structure.explanation: Present Perfect. 'I have seen'.

structure.questionText: ______ is the capital of France?
structure.explanation: Question. 'Apa ibukota...'. Gunakan 'What'.

structure.questionText: The cat ______ on the mat.
structure.explanation: Simple Present. 'Sits' (atau Sat jika past, tapi Sits opsi paling standar untuk fakta/kebiasaan jika tanpa konteks waktu).

structure.questionText: ______ you like some coffee?
structure.explanation: Offer. 'Would you like...'.

structure.questionText: She ______ a teacher.
structure.explanation: To Be. Subjek 'She'. Gunakan 'is'.

structure.questionText: Just off the Massachusetts coast ______ a popular summer resort area.
structure.explanation: Inversion of Place. Keterangan tempat 'Just off...' di awal kalimat memicu inversi (Verb + Subject). '...is (V) Martha's Vineyard (S)'.

structure.questionText: The older the tree, ______ the rings in its trunk.
structure.explanation: Double Comparative. Pola 'The older..., the closer...'.

structure.questionText: A pride of lions ______ up to forty lions.
structure.explanation: Modal Verb. 'A pride (S) can contain (V)'.

structure.questionText: A computer is usually chosen because of its simplicity of operation and ease of maintenance ______ its capacity to store information.
structure.explanation: Conjunction. 'As well as' (dan juga/serta) menghubungkan frasa benda setara.

structure.questionText: In a basketball game a player ______ bounce the ball.
structure.explanation: Modal Verb. 'Must' diikuti bare infinitive 'bounce'. 'Needs' butuh 'to', 'Ought' butuh 'to'.

structure.questionText: ______ gene in the human genome is unique.
structure.explanation: Quantifier. 'Gene' tunggal, gunakan 'Every'.

structure.questionText: The moon ______ around the earth.
structure.explanation: Simple Present. Subjek tunggal 'The moon' -> 'revolves'.

structure.questionText: ______ created the first nuclear reactor.
structure.explanation: Simple Sentence. Butuh subjek orang 'Enrico Fermi'.

structure.questionText: Pandas ______ bamboo.
structure.explanation: Adverb Position. Adverb 'mainly' sebelum verb 'eat'.

structure.questionText: The temperature at which water boils ______ with altitude.
structure.explanation: Subject-Verb Agreement. Subjek 'The temperature' (tunggal) -> 'varies'.

structure.questionText: ______ light travels faster than sound is a well-known fact.
structure.explanation: Noun Clause Subject. 'That light travels...' adalah subjek.

structure.questionText: The United States consists of fifty states, ______ has its own government.
structure.explanation: Adjective Clause / Quantifier. 'Each of which' menghubungkan dua klausa dan merujuk pada 'states'.

structure.questionText: ______ microscopic, bacteria are essential to life.
structure.explanation: Reduced Clause. 'Although (they are) microscopic...'.

structure.questionText: Oxygen, ______ nitrogen, is a gas found in the atmosphere.
structure.explanation: Preposition. 'Like' (seperti) digunakan untuk perbandingan noun.

structure.questionText: _______ tea plant are small and white.
structure.explanation: Missing Subject. Verb-nya adalah 'are' (plural), jadi kita butuh subjek plural. 'The flowers of the' menyediakan subjek 'flowers' yang sesuai.

structure.questionText: The tetracyclines, _______ antibiotics, are used to treat infections.
structure.explanation: Appositive. Frasa di antara koma menjelaskan subjek 'The tetracyclines'. Dibutuhkan noun phrase (appositive), bukan verb utuh.

structure.questionText: Any possible solution to the Irish question not only _______ on the good will of the British but also on the patience of the Irish.
structure.explanation: Subject-Verb Agreement. Subjek 'Any possible solution' (singular) memerlukan verb singular. 'Depends' adalah pilihan yang tepat.

structure.questionText: The stronger the magnet, _______.
structure.explanation: Double Comparative. Pola 'The + comparative ..., the + comparative ...'. Jawaban yang mengikuti pola ini adalah 'the greater the magnetic field'.

structure.questionText: Scientists are now beginning to conduct experiments on ______ trigger different sorts of health risks.
structure.explanation: Noun Clause. Setelah preposisi 'on', dibutuhkan noun clause. 'How noise pollution can' membentuk noun clause yang benar sebagai objek preposisi.

structure.questionText: Burning coal and oil releases poisonous gases into the air, _______ the earth's atmosphere.
structure.explanation: Present Participle Phrase. Digunakan untuk menunjukkan hasil atau aksi bersamaan dari klausa utama. 'Polluting' menjelaskan efek dari 'releases poisonous gases'.

structure.questionText: _______ several years for bamboo seeds to grow into plants that can be used for commercial purposes.
structure.explanation: It takes expression. Pola umum untuk menyatakan durasi waktu adalah 'It takes + time + to verb'.

structure.questionText: Arthur Miller’s play Death of a Salesman is the tragic story of a man destroyed by his own hollow values and _______ .
structure.explanation: Parallel Structure. 'hollow values' adalah noun phrase, jadi pasangannya setelah 'and' juga harus noun phrase tanpa preposisi tambahan.

structure.questionText: During the 19th century, heat was considered _______ a substance called caloric.
structure.explanation: Verb Pattern. Kata kerja 'considered' sering diikuti oleh to infinitive 'to be' (considered to be).

structure.questionText: Not only _______ generate energy, but it also produces fuel for other fission reactors.
options: it is a nuclear breeder reactor
structure.explanation: Inversion. Kalimat dimulai dengan 'Not only', sehingga memerlukan inversi (Auxiliary + Subject + Verb). 'does a nuclear breeder reactor' adalah bentuk yang benar.

structure.questionText: D.W. Griffith pioneered many of the stylistic features and filmmaking techniques _______ as the Hollywood standard.
structure.explanation: Adjective Clause. 'That became established' menjelaskan 'techniques'. Pilihan 'what' tidak bisa digunakan sebagai adjective clause connector untuk noun.

structure.questionText: _______ be needed, the water basin would need to be dammed.
structure.explanation: Conditionals (Inversion). Ini adalah bentuk inversi dari 'If hydroelectric power should be needed'. 'If' dihilangkan dan 'Should' dipindah ke depan.

structure.questionText: _______ in the atmosphere is the temperature falling below freezing.
structure.explanation: Noun Clause as Subject. Kalimat ini membutuhkan subjek. 'What produces frost' berfungsi sebagai subjek klausa (Noun Clause).

structure.questionText: Mallard ducks are known _______ and to build their nests near water.
structure.explanation: Parallel Structure / Verb Pattern. 'Are known' diikuti to infinitive ('to fly'), yang juga paralel dengan 'to build' setelah 'and'.

structure.questionText: The discovery of the halftone process in 1881 made it _______ for photographs to be reproduced in books and newspapers.
structure.explanation: Adjective usage. Pola 'made it + adjective + for someone/something'. Adjective 'possible' adalah kata yang tepat.

structure.questionText: Only in the last few years ______ to use home computers.
structure.explanation: Inversion. Kalimat dimulai dengan 'Only in...', expression of place/time yang membatasi, sehingga memerlukan inversi (Aux + S + V).

structure.questionText: Not until the discovery of fire _______ to cook food.
structure.explanation: Inversion. Kalimat dimulai dengan frasa negatif 'Not until', sehingga memerlukan inversi (Auxiliary + Subject + Verb). 'did people learn' adalah bentuk yang benar.

structure.questionText: The director of the program advised the students _______ on time.
structure.explanation: Infinitive. Kata kerja 'advise' diikuti oleh object + to infinitive. Polanya adalah 'advise someone to do something'.

structure.questionText: _______ business managers plan the tasks that their employees are to carry out.
structure.explanation: Zero Article/Generalization. 'Business managers' di sini merujuk pada manajer secara umum (plural noun), jadi tidak membutuhkan artikel 'The' atau subjek tambahan 'It is/They are' karena kalimat sudah memiliki struktur yang lengkap.

structure.questionText: The giant panda resembles the bear, _______ that it creates a distinct family of its own.
structure.explanation: Compound Sentence. Dibutuhkan konjungsi (but) dan klausa lengkap (subject + verb) untuk menghubungkan dua ide yang bertentangan.

structure.questionText: _______ the loud noise, the students could not concentrate on their exam.
structure.explanation: Preposition. 'The loud noise' adalah noun phrase, bukan klausa. Oleh karena itu, kita membutuhkan preposisi 'Because of', bukan konjungsi 'Because'.

structure.questionText: To generate income, magazine publishers must decide whether to increase the subscription price or _______.
structure.explanation: Parallel Structure. Setelah 'whether', ada 'to increase' (to infinitive). Maka setelah 'or', bentuknya juga harus 'to sell' (to infinitive).

structure.questionText: The Great Barrier Reef is _______ in the world.
structure.explanation: Superlative. Untuk menyatakan 'paling' di dunia, gunakan 'the + superlative adjective'. 'The largest' adalah bentuk yang tepat.

structure.questionText: _______ a bridge involves a complex balance of materials, physics, and design.
structure.explanation: Gerund as Subject. Subjek kalimat ini adalah sebuah aktivitas, jadi menggunakan Gerund (V-ing) 'Building' adalah yang paling tepat.

structure.questionText: If the oxygen supply in the atmosphere _______ plentiful, life as we know it would not exist.
structure.explanation: Conditional Sentence Type 2. Untuk pengandaian fakta saat ini (unreal present), 'be' selalu menjadi 'were' untuk semua subjek.

structure.questionText: Lasers are indispensable tools in medicine, _______ for delicate eye surgeries.
structure.explanation: Reduced Adjective Clause (Past Participle). Kalimat aslinya adalah 'which are used'. Dalam bentuk reduced, 'which are' dihilangkan, menyisakan 'used'.

structure.questionText: Alexander Graham Bell meant _______ a hearing aid but invented the telephone instead.
structure.explanation: Verb Pattern. Kata kerja 'mean' (bermaksud) diikuti oleh to infinitive. 'Meant to invent'.

structure.questionText: _______ is indispensable to the functioning of the ecosystem.
structure.explanation: Uncountable Noun. 'Water' sebagai zat umum (generalization) tidak memerlukan artikel 'the' atau 'a', dan tidak berbentuk jamak.

structure.questionText: The harder you study, _______ you will likely perform on the test.
structure.explanation: Double Comparative. Pola 'The + comparative, the + comparative'. Pasangan 'The harder' adalah 'the better'.

structure.questionText: _______ native to North America, the tomato is now cultivated worldwide.
structure.explanation: Reduced Clause Connector. 'Although (it is) native...'. 'Although' adalah conjunction yang tepat untuk diikuti adjektiva/klausa tereduksi. 'Despite' harus diikuti noun phrase.

structure.questionText: The committee suggested that the regulations _______ immediately.
structure.explanation: Subjunctive. Verb seperti 'suggest' diikuti 'that' clause menggunakan verb dasar (bare infinitive). Bentuk pasifnya adalah 'be + V3' (be enforced).

structure.questionText: Rarely _______ such a spectacular sunset as the one we saw yesterday.
structure.explanation: Inversion. Kata negatif 'Rarely' di awal kalimat memicu inversi. Karena kejadiannya lampau (saw yesterday), gunakan 'did we see'.

structure.questionText: The Statue of Liberty was a gift of friendship _______ the people of France to the people of the United States.
structure.explanation: Preposition. Pasangan yang tepat untuk menunjukkan asal pemberian adalah 'from ... to ...'.

structure.questionText: _______ primarily a plant-eater, the grizzly bear also eats flesh.
structure.explanation: Conjunction/Reduced Clause. Dibutuhkan kata hubung pertentangan untuk menghubungkan 'plant-eater' dan 'eats flesh'. 'Although (it is)...' adalah pilihan tepat.

structure.questionText: Only after the invention of the microscope _______ capable of understanding the structure of cells.
structure.explanation: Inversion. Frasa 'Only after...' di awal kalimat memicu inversi (Aux + S + V). 'did scientists become' adalah struktur yang benar.

structure.questionText: It is generally believed that an MBA degree _______ a good stepping stone for a career in management.
structure.explanation: Subject-Verb. Klausa 'that an MBA degree...' membutuhkan verb utama. Subjeknya 'an MBA degree' (singular), maka verb-nya 'is'.

structure.questionText: The higher the standard of living, _______ .
options: the greater the amount of energy consumed
the amount of energy consumed is greater
is the amount of energy consumed greater
structure.explanation: Double Comparative. Pola 'The + comparative ..., the + comparative ...'. Jawaban ini mengikuti pola tersebut dengan benar.

structure.questionText: _______ largely by wind, the cactus has a shallow root system.
structure.explanation: Reduced Adjective Clause (Passive). Aslinya 'Because it is dispersed...', direduksi menjadi 'Dispersed'.

structure.questionText: _______ sedimentary rocks are formed is a subject of geological study.
structure.explanation: Noun Clause as Subject. 'How sedimentary rocks are formed' berfungsi sebagai subjek kalimat.

structure.questionText: Only recently _______ possible to explore the deep ocean floor.
structure.explanation: Inversion. Kalimat diawali dengan 'Only recently', sehingga memerlukan inversi (Aux + S + V).

structure.questionText: _______ extensively for distinct colors, tulips are grown in many gardens.
structure.explanation: Reduced Adjective Clause (Passive). Tulips 'are cultivated', jadi bentuk reduksinya adalah 'Cultivated'.

structure.questionText: Proteins are composed of _______ amino acids.
structure.explanation: Reduced Adjective Clause. 'Units (which are) called amino acids'.

structure.questionText: _______ under a microscope, a snowflake has a delicate six-pointed shape.
structure.explanation: Participial Phrase (Passive). Snowflake 'is seen' (dilihat), bukan 'looking' (melihat). Jadi gunakan V3 'Seen'.

structure.questionText: _______ California's agricultural success is its irrigation system.
structure.explanation: Subject. Kalimat membutuhkan subjek noun phrase. 'The reason for...' adalah subjek yang tepat.

structure.questionText: Not until the 1960s _______ recognized as a distinct art form.
structure.explanation: Inversion. 'Not until...' memicu inversi. 'Was photography' (Aux + S).

structure.questionText: Generally, the larger the mammal, _______ its heart rate.
structure.explanation: Double Comparative. 'The larger..., the slower...'.

structure.questionText: _______ determines a person's eye color is a specific pair of genes.
structure.explanation: Noun Clause as Subject. 'What determines...' adalah klausa subjek.

structure.questionText: Rarely _______ such a severe winter storm in this region.
structure.explanation: Inversion. 'Rarely' (negatif) di awal kalimat. Gunakan 'do we encounter'.

structure.questionText: _______ a painter, Leonardo da Vinci was also an inventor and scientist.
structure.explanation: Prepositional Phrase. 'Besides being...' menjelaskan peran tambahan selain subjek utama.

structure.questionText: The more you practice speaking, _______ you will become.
structure.explanation: Double Comparative. 'The more..., the more fluent...'.

structure.questionText: Should it rain tomorrow, the picnic _______ postponed.
structure.explanation: Conditional Type 1 (Inverted). 'Should it rain' = 'If it rains'. Main clause menggunakan 'will be'.

structure.questionText: _______ known as the 'Red Planet', Mars has iron oxide on its surface.
structure.explanation: Participial Phrase. 'Being known as...' (Karena dikenal sebagai...). 'Being' bisa dihilangkan (menjadi 'Known as...'), tapi jika ada pilihan 'Being', itu juga benar secara gramatikal sebagai participle.

structure.questionText: _______ effective, a vaccine must produce immunity.
structure.explanation: Infinitive of Purpose. 'To be effective' (Untuk menjadi efektif).

structure.questionText: Never before _______ such a large audience attended the concert.
structure.explanation: Inversion. 'Never before' memicu inversi. Subjek 'audience' (collective singular) menggunakan 'has'.

structure.questionText: The Empire State Building is _______ than the Chrysler Building.
structure.explanation: Comparative. Ada kata 'than', jadi gunakan 'taller'.

structure.questionText: _______ dolphins have lungs, they must breathe air.
structure.explanation: Conjunction. Diikuti oleh klausa (subject + verb), jadi gunakan 'Because'.

structure.questionText: _______ in 1492, Columbus's voyage changed history.
structure.explanation: Past Participle Phrase. Voyage 'was begun', jadi reduksinya 'Begun'.

structure.questionText: One of the _______ problems in the city is traffic.
structure.explanation: Superlative. 'One of the + superlative'. 'Worst' adalah bentuk superlatif dari bad.

structure.questionText: _______ penicillin, bacteria were a major cause of death.
structure.explanation: Preposition Phrase. 'Prior to' (sebelum) diikuti noun phrase.

structure.questionText: _______ physics, she also studies mathematics.
structure.explanation: Preposition. 'In addition to' (selain) diikuti noun.

structure.questionText: _______ gene is responsible for a specific trait.
structure.explanation: Quantifier. 'Gene' adalah singular, jadi 'Each' adalah pilihan yang tepat. Yang lain untuk plural/uncountable.

structure.questionText: Had he known about the traffic, he _______ left earlier.
structure.explanation: Conditional Type 3 (Inverted). 'Had he known' = 'If he had known'. Main clause pakai 'would have + V3'.

structure.questionText: _______ migratory birds return to the same location every year.
structure.explanation: Quantifier. 'Birds' plural countable, jadi gunakan 'Many'. 'Every' butuh singular.

structure.questionText: The professor required that everyone _______ the assignment by Friday.
structure.explanation: Subjunctive. 'Require that' diikuti bare infinitive 'submit'.

structure.questionText: _______ a solid, water turns into ice.
structure.explanation: Infinitive of Purpose. 'To become a solid...' (Untuk menjadi padat...).

structure.questionText: Not only _______ intelligent, but he is also hardworking.
structure.explanation: Inversion. 'Not only + Aux + S'.

structure.questionText: _______ photosynthesis, plants convert sunlight into energy.
structure.explanation: Preposition. 'Through' (Melalui) proses fotosintesis.

structure.questionText: _______ the rain, the game was cancelled.
structure.explanation: Preposition. 'The rain' noun phrase, jadi 'Because of'.

structure.questionText: _______ Mount Everest is the highest peak in the world.
structure.explanation: Zero Article. Nama gunung tunggal (Mount Everest) tidak menggunakan artikel.

structure.questionText: Calculus is _______ subject for many students.
structure.explanation: Article + Adjective + Noun. 'A difficult subject'.

structure.questionText: _______ by the audience, the actor bowed.
structure.explanation: Past Participle. Actor 'was applauded', reduksi pasif 'Applauded'.

structure.questionText: This problem is _______ than the last one.
structure.explanation: Comparative. 'Easier than'.

structure.questionText: Neither the teacher _______ the students were present.
structure.explanation: Correlative Conjunction. 'Neither... nor...'.

structure.questionText: _______ you study, the better your grades will be.
structure.explanation: Double Comparative. 'The harder..., the better...'.

structure.questionText: _______ of the two candidates is qualified.
structure.explanation: Pronoun Agreement. 'Is' singular requiring singular subject. 'Neither' (salah satu dari tidak keduanya) selalu singular. 'Both' plural. 'All/Some' plural context.

structure.questionText: The atmosphere protects us _______ harmful solid radiation.
structure.explanation: Preposition. 'Protect from'.

structure.questionText: _______ the heavy traffic, we arrived on time.
structure.explanation: Preposition. 'Despite' diikuti noun phrase ('the heavy traffic').

structure.questionText: The committee _______ of fifteen members.
structure.explanation: Subject-Verb Agreement. 'Committee' collective noun (singular unit) -> 'consists'.

structure.questionText: We look forward _______ from you soon.
structure.explanation: Gerund. 'Look forward to' diikuti V-ing.

structure.questionText: _______ finishes first will win the prize.
structure.explanation: Noun Clause Subject. 'Whoever' berfungsi sebagai subjek dari 'finishes'.

structure.questionText: Mathematics _______ not an easy subject for everyone.
structure.explanation: Subject-Verb. 'Mathematics' singular form -> 'is'.

structure.questionText: The news _______ good today.
structure.explanation: Subject-Verb. 'News' uncountable singular -> 'is'.

structure.questionText: _______ a doctor, you need a medical degree.
structure.explanation: Infinitive of Purpose. 'To become...'.

structure.questionText: She is interested _______ learning new languages.
structure.explanation: Preposition. 'Interested in'.

structure.questionText: _______ tired, he went to bed early.
structure.explanation: Present Participle (Active). 'Feeling tired' (Because he felt tired).

structure.questionText: The car _______ gas.
structure.explanation: Phrasal Verb. 'Ran out of' (kehabisan).

structure.questionText: _______ a high level of protein, beans are a healthy meat substitute.
structure.explanation: Present Participle Phrase (Active). Beans 'contain' protein, so the reduced form is 'Containing'.

structure.questionText: _______ the global economy, oil prices fluctuate frequently.
structure.explanation: Past Participle Phrase (Passive). Oil prices 'are affected by' the global economy, reduced to 'Affected by'.

structure.questionText: The moon is _______ the earth.
structure.explanation: Comparative. When comparing two specific things (moon and earth), use comparative form 'closer to'.

structure.questionText: Not only _______ the book, but he also memorized it.
structure.explanation: Inversion. 'Not only' at the beginning requires inversion: Auxiliary + Subject + Verb.

structure.questionText: _______ variety of flowers are found in the tropical rainforest.
structure.explanation: Article Usage. 'A wide variety of...' is a common collocation.

structure.questionText: _______ arrives early will get the best seats.
structure.explanation: Noun Clause Subject. 'Whoever' acts as the subject of the clause 'arrives early' and the whole clause is the subject of 'will get'.

structure.questionText: It is important that he _______ the documents immediately.
structure.explanation: Subjunctive. 'Important that' requires the bare infinitive form of the verb 'sign'.

structure.questionText: _______ of the danger, the hikers continued their journey.
structure.explanation: Adjective Phrase. '(Being) Unaware of the danger...' describes the subject 'the hikers'.

structure.questionText: By the time the police arrived, the thieves _______.
structure.explanation: Past Perfect. Action completed before another past action ('arrived'). Use 'had + V3'.

structure.questionText: _______ milk is rich in calcium.
structure.explanation: Zero Article. 'Milk' is an uncountable noun used in a general sense, so no article is needed, just the adjective 'Fresh'.

structure.questionText: _______ the bad weather, the flight took off on time.
structure.explanation: 'Despite' followed by a noun phrase 'the bad weather' is correct.

structure.questionText: The director suggested that she _______ the script immediately.
structure.explanation: Subjunctive mood used after 'suggest'. Base form of the verb 'rewrite' is required.

structure.questionText: Hardly _______ down when the phone rang.
structure.explanation: Inversion is required after 'Hardly'. 'Had I sat' is the correct past perfect inversion.

structure.questionText: The physics experiment _______ the students is complex.
structure.explanation: Reduced relative clause. 'The experiment (which was) conducted by the students'.

structure.questionText: Not only _______ English, but he also speaks French.
structure.explanation: Inversion required after 'Not only' at the beginning of the sentence.

structure.questionText: If I _______ you, I would take that job offer.
structure.explanation: Second conditional (hypothetical). 'Were' is used for all subjects.

structure.questionText: The sooner we start, _______ we will finish.
structure.explanation: Double comparative structure: 'The sooner..., the sooner...'.

structure.questionText: _______ variety of flowers were planted in the garden.
structure.explanation: 'A large variety' is the correct noun phrase.

structure.questionText: She is used to _______ early in the morning.
structure.explanation: 'Be used to' is followed by a gerund (-ing form).

structure.questionText: The committee _______ of ten members.
structure.explanation: Collective noun 'committee' takes a singular verb 'consists'.

structure.questionText: Unless you _______ harder, you will not pass the exam.
structure.explanation: Simple present is used in the 'unless' clause for future meaning.

structure.questionText: I prefer coffee _______ tea.
structure.explanation: Correct structure is 'prefer X to Y'.

structure.questionText: She acted as if she _______ everything.
structure.explanation: 'As if' introduces a hypothetical situation, requiring past tense 'knew'.

structure.questionText: _______, the team continued to practice.
structure.explanation: 'Despite' followed by a noun phrase 'the rain'.

structure.questionText: The book _______ I borrowed is interesting.
structure.explanation: 'Which' is used for things (the book).

structure.questionText: It is essential that everyone _______ calm.
structure.explanation: Subjunctive mood: 'It is essential that' + subject + base verb.

structure.questionText: Only after the meeting _______ did they leave.
structure.explanation: Inversion in main clause 'did they leave', but the time clause uses normal order.

structure.questionText: Neither the manager nor the employees _______ satisfied.
structure.explanation: Verb agrees with the closer subject 'employees' (plural).

structure.questionText: By next year, I _______ from university.
structure.explanation: Future Perfect 'will have graduated' for action completed by a future time.

structure.questionText: _______ being tired, he finished the work.
structure.explanation: 'In spite of' is followed by a gerund 'being'.

structure.questionText: The news _______ shocking to everyone.
structure.explanation: 'News' is an uncountable singular noun.

structure.questionText: _______ Mount Everest is the highest peak in the world.
structure.explanation: Individual mountain names generally do not take an article.

structure.questionText: Would you mind _______ the window?
structure.explanation: 'Do you mind' is followed by a gerund.

structure.questionText: The woman _______ car was stolen called the police.
structure.explanation: Possessive relative pronoun 'whose'.

structure.questionText: _______ better if you had asked for help.
structure.explanation: Third conditional result clause: 'would have + past participle'.

structure.questionText: They avoided _______ through the dark alley.
structure.explanation: 'Avoid' is followed by a gerund.

structure.questionText: The professor along with his students _______ attending the conference.
structure.explanation: Subject is 'The professor' (singular). 'Along with' is an additive phrase, not conjunction.

structure.questionText: _______ a doctor, he knows how to treat the wound.
structure.explanation: Participle phrase 'Being a doctor' acting as reason.

structure.questionText: It was _______ cold that we stayed inside.
structure.explanation: 'So + adjective + that' pattern.

structure.questionText: We look forward _______ you soon.
structure.explanation: 'Look forward to' is followed by a gerund.

structure.questionText: Had I known about the traffic, I _______ earlier.
structure.explanation: Inverted third conditional: 'If I had known' -> 'Had I known'. Result: 'would have left'.

structure.questionText: Mathematics _______ usually considered a difficult subject.
structure.explanation: Subject names ending in -ics (Mathematics) are singular.

structure.questionText: There is _______ water left in the bottle.
structure.explanation: 'Water' is uncountable, so 'little' is used.

structure.questionText: _______ he tried hard, he failed the test.
structure.explanation: Conjunction 'Although' introduces a clause (S+V).

structure.questionText: I wish I _______ speak Spanish fluently.
structure.explanation: 'Wish' generally takes past models or subjunctive forms. 'Could' is appropriate here.

structure.questionText: Each of the participants _______ given a certificate.
structure.explanation: 'Each of' takes a singular verb.

structure.questionText: The number of students _______ increasing every year.
structure.explanation: 'The number of' takes a singular verb (referring to the count).

structure.questionText: The jury _______ unable to reach a verdict.
structure.explanation: When individuals in a collective noun act separately, use plural verb.

structure.questionText: She is the _______ girl in the class.
structure.explanation: Superlative form 'the most intelligent'.

structure.questionText: _______ I speak to Mr. Smith, please?
structure.explanation: Polite request 'May I'.

structure.questionText: The house _______ built in 1990.
structure.explanation: Simple past passive 'was built' (specific past time 'in 1990').

structure.questionText: He asked me where _______ going.
structure.explanation: Indirect question word order is Statement order (S+V).

structure.questionText: _______ John nor his friends are going.
structure.explanation: 'Neither... nor' correlation.

structure.questionText: This is the place _______ we met.
structure.explanation: Relative adverb 'where' for place.

structure.questionText: Let's go for a walk, _______?
structure.explanation: Tag question for 'Let's' is 'shall we'.

structure.questionText: She has been working here _______ five years.
structure.explanation: 'For' indicates duration.

structure.questionText: I can't help _______ at his jokes.
structure.explanation: Idiom 'can't help' takes gerund.

structure.questionText: _______ arriving at the airport, he realized he forgot his passport.
structure.explanation: 'On' + Gerund means 'When...' or 'Upon...'.

structure.questionText: The CEO, _______ expertise is well known, will give a speech.
structure.explanation: Possessive relative 'whose'.

structure.questionText: Not until yesterday _______ the news.
structure.explanation: Inversion after 'Not until': 'did I hear'.

structure.questionText: No sooner _______ entered the room than the lights went out.
structure.explanation: 'No sooner... than' structure takes inverted past perfect.

structure.questionText: A number of students _______ absent today.
structure.explanation: 'A number of' takes a plural verb.

structure.questionText: The equipment _______ delivered tomorrow.
structure.explanation: Future passive 'will be delivered'.

structure.questionText: He failed the test _______ his hard work.
structure.explanation: 'Despite' + Noun Phrase.

structure.questionText: I would rather you _______ now.
structure.explanation: 'Would rather' + object + past tense (subjunctive meaning).

structure.questionText: It is time we _______ home.
structure.explanation: 'It is time' + past tense (subjunctive meaning).

structure.questionText: She is believed _______ the best singer.
structure.explanation: Passive reporting verb structure: 'is believed to be'.

structure.questionText: _______ lay the foundation for success.
structure.explanation: Gerund subject 'Working hard'.

structure.questionText: The more you practice, _______ you become.
structure.explanation: Double comparative: 'The cleaner, the better'.

structure.questionText: Little _______ that he was being watched.
structure.explanation: Negative adverb 'Little' starts sentence -> Inversion.

structure.questionText: By the time you arrive, I _______ everything.
structure.explanation: Future Perfect with 'By the time'.

structure.questionText: She suggested that he _______ a doctor.
structure.explanation: Subjunctive after 'suggest'.

structure.questionText: I have never seen _______ beautiful painting.
structure.explanation: 'Such a' + adjective + noun.

structure.questionText: Either you or he _______ responsible.
structure.explanation: Verb agrees with closer subject (he -> is).

structure.questionText: _______ from the top of the mountain, the view was breathtaking.
structure.explanation: Past participle 'Seen' modifying 'view' (Passive meaning).

structure.questionText: He speaks as though he _______ the boss.
structure.explanation: 'As though' + past subjunctive 'were'.

structure.questionText: It is polite _______ 'thank you'.
structure.explanation: Adjective + Infinitive structure.

structure.questionText: She had her car _______ yesterday.
structure.explanation: Causative 'Have something done'.

structure.questionText: The data _______ accurate.
structure.explanation: 'Data' is technically plural (datum is singular), though often used as singular. In strict grammar (TOEFL), plural 'are' is safer, or singular 'is' if considered mass. Let's use 'are' as traditional plural.

structure.questionText: _______ rich, he is not happy.
structure.explanation: 'Although' + Adjective (reduced 'Although he is rich').

structure.questionText: Rarely _______ such talent.
structure.explanation: Inversion after 'Rarely'.

structure.questionText: I object to _______ processed like this.
structure.explanation: 'Object to' + Gerund.

structure.questionText: _______ of the two sisters is the taller one?
structure.explanation: 'Which' implies a choice from a limited set.

structure.questionText: Five miles _______ a long distance to walk.
structure.explanation: Distance/Money/Time as a unit takes singular verb.

structure.questionText: _______ help, please let me know.
structure.explanation: Inverted 1st conditional 'Should you need' (= If you should need).

structure.questionText: He is _______ to pass the exam.
structure.explanation: 'Likely' fits 'He is likely to...'.

structure.questionText: I remember _______ the door.
structure.explanation: 'Remember' + Gerund = memory of past action.

structure.questionText: _______ broken, the vase could not be repaired.
structure.explanation: Perfect Participle Passive 'Having been broken'.

structure.questionText: The reason _______ he left is unclear.
structure.explanation: 'The reason why'.

structure.questionText: The rich _______ to help the poor.
structure.explanation: 'The rich' = rich people (plural).

structure.questionText: _______ finish the work on time.
structure.explanation: 'In order to' + Verb.

structure.questionText: She went to the market _______ buy some milk.
structure.explanation: Infinitive of purpose 'to buy'.

structure.questionText: I'm looking forward to _______ from you.
structure.explanation: 'Look forward to' + Gerund.

structure.questionText: It's no use _______ over spilt milk.
structure.explanation: Idiom 'It's no use' + Gerund.

structure.questionText: Were I in your position, I _______ accept.
structure.explanation: Inverted 2nd conditional 'Were I...' takes 'would'.

structure.questionText: _______ John, everyone was there.
structure.explanation: Preposition 'Except'.

structure.questionText: She sings _______ than her sister.
structure.explanation: Comparative adverb 'more beautifully' modifies 'sings'.

structure.questionText: _______ a teacher, she is very patient.
structure.explanation: 'As' = in the capacity of.

structure.questionText: He is the man _______ I spoke.
structure.explanation: 'To whom' is the formal structure.

structure.questionText: _______ you study, the better your grades.
structure.explanation: Double comparative 'The harder...'.

structure.questionText: She made me _______ the entire report.
structure.explanation: Causative 'Make' takes bare infinitive.

structure.questionText: He talks as if he _______ the answer.
structure.explanation: 'As if' + past subjunctive.

structure.questionText: I would rather go to the beach _______ stay home.
structure.explanation: 'Would rather... than...'.

structure.questionText: It is vital that the document _______ signed.
structure.explanation: Subjunctive 'be'.

structure.questionText: Hardly had I arrived _______ it started to rain.
structure.explanation: 'Hardly... when...'.

structure.questionText: Scarcely _______ sat down when the phone rang.
structure.explanation: Inversion with 'Scarcely'.

structure.questionText: Only by practicing _______ improve.
structure.explanation: Inversion after 'Only by...'.

structure.questionText: The problem _______ by the manager.
structure.explanation: Passive voice 'was solved'.

structure.questionText: Instead of _______ TV, he read a book.
structure.explanation: Preposition 'Instead of' + Gerund.

structure.questionText: There _______ many reasons for this.
structure.explanation: 'Reasons' is plural -> 'are'.

structure.questionText: Not until the resolution was adopted _______ the full impact of the new policy.
structure.explanation: Kalimat yang diawali dengan ekspresi negatif seperti 'Not until' memerlukan inversi (susunan terbalik) antara subjek dan kata kerja bantu (auxiliary verb). 'Did' digunakan sebagai auxiliary verb untuk bentuk waktu lampau (simple past tense).

structure.questionText: Internal revenue service codes _______ that all residents file a federal income tax return by April 15.
structure.explanation: Subjek 'codes' adalah jamak, sehingga membutuhkan kata kerja jamak 'mandate'. Kalimat ini juga menggunakan struktur subjunctive (mandate that... file), di mana bentuk dasar kata kerja (bare infinitive) 'file' digunakan di dalam klausa kata benda.

structure.questionText: _______ for the timely intervention of the paramedics, the patient would not have survived the allergic reaction.
structure.explanation: Ini adalah bentuk pengandaian inversi (Third Conditional) tanpa menggunakan kata 'if'. 'Had it not been for' adalah bentuk formal dari 'If it had not been for', yang digunakan untuk menggambarkan situasi masa lalu yang tidak terjadi.

structure.questionText: The generic name of a prescription drug must be printed on the label _______ by its brand name.
structure.explanation: Ini adalah klausa relatif pasif yang direduksi (reduced passive relative clause). Bentuk lengkapnya adalah 'which is followed by'. Dalam bentuk reduksi, relative pronoun dan to be dihilangkan, menyisakan kata kerja bentuk ketiga (past participle) 'followed'.

structure.questionText: Rarely _______ such a combination of talent and charisma in a single performer.
structure.explanation: Kata 'Rarely' adalah kata keterangan restriktif/negatif. Jika diletakkan di awal kalimat, ia memerlukan inversi antara subjek dan kata kerja bantu. Kata kerja bantu 'does' diperlukan untuk subjek tunggal 'one'.

structure.questionText: The research committee requested that the scientist _______ the experimental data before the final presentation.
structure.explanation: Kalimat ini menggunakan subjunctive mood, yang dipicu oleh kata kerja 'requested' diikuti oleh 'that'. Dalam bentuk subjunctive, kata kerja dasar (base form) 'verify' digunakan tanpa memandang subjeknya (meskipun subjek tunggal 'the scientist').

structure.questionText: Archaeologists found that the ancient civilization had developed complex irrigation systems, _______ advanced architectural techniques.
structure.explanation: Soal ini menguji struktur paralel. Frasa 'as well as' dengan tepat menghubungkan dua frasa kata benda yang setara, yaitu 'complex irrigation systems' dan 'advanced architectural techniques', untuk menunjukkan penambahan.

structure.questionText: _______ by the structural damage caused by the earthquake, the inspectors ordered the immediate evacuation of the building.
structure.explanation: Ini adalah frasa partisipial. Para inspektur adalah pihak yang merasakan emosi tersebut (makna pasif), sehingga kata kerja bentuk ketiga (past participle) 'Alarmed' digunakan untuk memodifikasi subjek utama 'the inspectors'.

structure.questionText: Only after the discovery of the Rosetta Stone _______ possible for scholars to decipher Egyptian hieroglyphs.
structure.explanation: Frasa 'Only after...' yang diletakkan di awal kalimat memicu aturan inversi. Kata kerja bantu (auxiliary) 'did' harus ditempatkan sebelum subjek 'it'.

structure.questionText: So intense _______ the heat from the forest fire that even the surrounding lakes began to evaporate.
structure.explanation: Kalimat ini menggunakan inversi untuk penekanan dengan pola 'So + adjective'. Strukturnya menjadi 'So + adjective + verb + subject'. Di sini, 'was' adalah kata kerja dan 'the heat' adalah subjeknya.

structure.questionText: Under no circumstances _______ employees to use company equipment for personal ventures.
structure.explanation: Frasa preposisional negatif 'Under no circumstances' di awal kalimat mensyaratkan inversi. Kata kerja 'are' bertindak sebagai predikat utama dan ditempatkan sebelum subjek 'employees', membentuk kalimat 'are employees allowed...' (allowed merupakan bagian dari pasif namun are adalah auxiliary yang diinversi).

structure.questionText: The more the athletes trained at high altitudes, _______ their cardiovascular endurance became.
structure.explanation: Ini adalah struktur komparatif ganda (double comparative) yang menggunakan pola 'The + comparative..., the + comparative...'. 'The greater' melengkapi pola tersebut sejalan dengan 'The more'.

structure.questionText: It is imperative that the new software update _______ on all corporate devices by midnight.
structure.explanation: Kata sifat 'imperative' memicu penggunaan subjunctive mood dalam klausa 'that'. Karena makna kalimat adalah pasif (perangkat lunak diinstal), kita menggunakan bentuk dasar pasif, yaitu 'be + past participle' (be installed).

structure.questionText: _______ his immense contribution to modern physics, Richard Feynman was also a gifted bongo player.
structure.explanation: Frasa partisipial 'Known for' bertindak sebagai kata sifat (adjective) yang memodifikasi subjek 'Richard Feynman'. Karena maknanya adalah pasif ('Dikenal karena'), maka past participle digunakan.

structure.questionText: Were the central bank _______ interest rates, inflation might be curbed more effectively.
structure.explanation: Ini adalah pengandaian bersyarat tipe 2 (Second Conditional) yang mengalami inversi. Pola 'If the central bank raised...' dapat diubah menjadi inversi formal 'Were the central bank to raise...'.

structure.questionText: Among the most fascinating astronomical phenomena _______ the pulsar, a highly magnetized rotating neutron star.
structure.explanation: Kalimat ini mengalami inversi lokatif/preposisional. Frasa preposisi 'Among the most fascinating astronomical phenomena' berada di depan, sehingga subjek asli 'the pulsar' (tunggal) berada di belakang predikat 'is'.

structure.questionText: The board of directors insisted that the financial discrepancies _______ immediately.
structure.explanation: Kata kerja 'insisted' memerlukan klausa 'that' dalam bentuk subjunctive. Karena pemeriksaannya bersifat pasif (perbedaan keuangan diperiksa), maka bentuk yang benar adalah 'be investigated' (bentuk dasar dari 'to be' + past participle).

structure.questionText: No sooner had the expedition reached the summit _______ a fierce blizzard engulfed the mountain.
structure.explanation: Pasangan korelasi waktu untuk 'No sooner' selalu 'than'. Ini menunjukkan bahwa satu kejadian terjadi segera setelah kejadian lain.

structure.questionText: _______ the intricate details of the contract, the lawyer was able to identify several loopholes.
structure.explanation: Ini adalah perfect participle phrase ('Having' + past participle). Struktur ini menunjukkan bahwa tindakan (mempelajari) telah diselesaikan sebelum tindakan utama (mengidentifikasi) terjadi, dan dilakukan oleh subjek yang sama (pengacara).

structure.questionText: The synthesis of these chemical compounds requires a precise temperature, _______ the reaction will fail.
structure.explanation: Kata 'otherwise' (jika tidak) berfungsi dengan tepat di sini sebagai kata penghubung untuk menunjukkan konsekuensi negatif jika kondisi yang disebutkan sebelumnya tidak terpenuhi.

structure.questionText: Seldom _______ such an innovative approach to urban planning been proposed in this decade.
structure.explanation: Kata keterangan negatif 'Seldom' di awal kalimat memicu inversi. Karena subjek sebenarnya adalah 'an innovative approach' (tunggal) dan kalimat utamanya adalah present perfect ('been proposed'), kata kerja bantu tunggal yang benar adalah 'has'.

structure.questionText: The CEO's recommendation that the company _______ its overseas operations was met with strong resistance.
structure.explanation: Kata benda 'recommendation' diikuti oleh klausa 'that' memerlukan penggunaan subjunctive. Bentuk kata kerja dasar (base form) 'expand' harus digunakan, terlepas dari subjek tunggal 'the company'.

structure.questionText: _______ a solid foundation in mathematics, students often struggle with advanced physics concepts.
structure.explanation: 'Lacking' bertindak sebagai present participle yang membentuk frasa partisipial, artinya 'karena tidak memiliki'. Subjek utama 'students' adalah pihak yang melakukan tindakan 'lacking' tersebut.

structure.questionText: Not only _______ to lower blood pressure, but it also improves overall cardiovascular health.
structure.explanation: Frasa 'Not only' yang diletakkan di awal kalimat memerlukan inversi subjek dan auxiliary verb. 'Does' diletakkan sebelum subjek 'regular exercise', diikuti bentuk dasar kata kerja 'help'.

structure.questionText: The manuscript, _______ for over a century, was finally discovered in the monastery's hidden archives.
structure.explanation: 'Having been lost' adalah bentuk perfect passive participle. Ini mereduksi klausa relatif 'which had been lost', menandakan kondisi pasif yang terjadi sebelum penemuan naskah tersebut.

structure.questionText: _______ had the orchestra begun playing when a power outage plunged the concert hall into darkness.
structure.explanation: Kata 'Hardly' berpasangan dengan kata sambung 'when' untuk menunjukkan dua kejadian lampau yang terjadi nyaris bersamaan. ('No sooner' akan berpasangan dengan 'than').

structure.questionText: It is crucial that any employee who _______ signs of illness stay home to prevent spreading the infection.
structure.explanation: Di dalam klausa relatif 'who... illness', kata kerja berikatan langsung dengan subjek relatif 'who' yang merujuk pada 'any employee' (tunggal). Jadi, 'exhibits' (tunggal) adalah benar. Kata kerja utama klausa noun 'stay' sudah benar dalam bentuk subjunctive yang dipicu oleh 'crucial'.

structure.questionText: The theory of relativity, _______ by Einstein in 1905, fundamentally altered our understanding of space and time.
structure.explanation: Ini adalah klausa relatif yang direduksi. Bentuk lengkapnya 'which was proposed' dipersingkat dengan menghilangkan relative pronoun dan to be, menyisakan past participle 'proposed'.

structure.questionText: On the horizon _______ the faint outlines of the mountains, obscured by the morning mist.
structure.explanation: Kalimat ini menggunakan inversi lokatif. Frasa preposisional 'On the horizon' ada di awal, membalik susunan predikat dan subjek. Subjek aslinya adalah jamak, yaitu 'the faint outlines', sehingga membutuhkan kata kerja jamak 'appear'.

structure.questionText: By the time the diplomatic mission arrived, the border conflict _______ significantly.
structure.explanation: Frasa waktu 'By the time + simple past' menandakan bahwa suatu kejadian telah selesai sebelum kejadian lain di masa lalu. Oleh karena itu, tense yang tepat untuk klausa utama adalah past perfect tense ('had escalated').

structure.questionText: _______ the high cost of raw materials, the manufacturer managed to maintain its profit margins.
structure.explanation: 'Despite' adalah preposisi yang digunakan untuk menunjukkan kontras dan diikuti oleh frasa kata benda ('the high cost...'). 'Even though' memerlukan subjek dan kata kerja penuh.

structure.questionText: Scarcely _______ the door when the phone started ringing incessantly.
structure.explanation: Seperti 'Hardly' dan 'Rarely', kata 'Scarcely' memicu inversi subjek dan auxiliary. Karena pasangannya adalah past perfect untuk menunjukkan aksi pertama selesai sebelum yang kedua, 'had I closed' adalah pilihan yang paling tepat.

structure.questionText: The professor suggested that the research paper _______ submitted no later than Friday afternoon.
structure.explanation: Kata kerja 'suggested' menuntut bentuk subjunctive untuk klausa yang mengikutinya. Karena maknanya pasif ('makalah dikumpulkan'), digunakan bentuk dasar (base form) dari 'to be', yaitu 'be'.

structure.questionText: A newly discovered species of orchid, _______ in the dense Amazon rainforest, has attracted botanists worldwide.
structure.explanation: Kata 'found' di sini merupakan participle pasif yang mereduksi klausa adjektif 'which was found'. Frasa ini berfungsi menjelaskan kata benda 'species'.

structure.questionText: _______ a sudden drop in atmospheric pressure, the captain warned the crew of an impending storm.
structure.explanation: Bentuk perfect participle 'Having noticed' menunjukkan bahwa kapten (subjek kalimat utama) telah selesai menyadari penurunan tekanan udara sebelum ia memperingatkan awak kapalnya.

structure.questionText: Only by implementing stringent conservation protocols _______ the endangered wildlife habitat.
structure.explanation: Frasa 'Only by + gerund' di awal kalimat mensyaratkan inversi pada klausa utamanya. Modal auxiliary 'can' diletakkan sebelum subjek 'they'.

structure.questionText: The committee dictates that every applicant _______ a thorough background check prior to employment.
structure.explanation: Kata kerja 'dictates' menyatakan perintah, yang memicu subjunctive mood dalam klausa 'that'. Kata kerja dasar 'undergo' digunakan meskipun subjeknya 'every applicant' merupakan singular.

structure.questionText: _______ as a remedy for centuries, the herb is now being investigated for its pharmacological properties.
structure.explanation: Ini merupakan participial phrase pasif. Karena ramuan (the herb) 'digunakan' dan bukan 'menggunakan', maka past participle 'Used' adalah bentuk yang tepat sebagai reduksi dari 'Having been used' atau 'Because it was used'.

structure.questionText: Should the regulatory board _______ the merger, the new conglomerate would monopolize the industry.
structure.explanation: Kalimat ini adalah bentuk inversi bersyarat (First/Second conditional) untuk pengandaian menggunakan 'Should'. Setelah 'Should' sebagai auxiliary, kata kerja yang menyertainya haruslah bentuk dasar (bare infinitive) yaitu 'approve'.

structure.questionText: The more intricate the tapestry's design, _______ the time required by the artisans to complete it.
structure.explanation: Pola perbandingan ganda (double comparatives) mensyaratkan 'The + comparative adjective' di kedua klausa. 'The greater' sejajar dengan 'The more intricate'.

structure.questionText: Attached to the email _______ the revised blueprints and the finalized budget proposal.
structure.explanation: Ini adalah kalimat inversi karena frasa past participle 'Attached to the email' di letakkan di awal. Subjek sesungguhnya ada di belakang predikat dan berbentuk jamak: 'the revised blueprints and the finalized budget proposal', sehingga verb yang digunakan adalah 'are'.

structure.questionText: _______ that the Earth revolves around the sun was once considered heresy by the scientific establishment.
structure.explanation: Kalimat ini membutuhkan subjek tunggal untuk mengawali klausa '...that the Earth revolves around the sun' (appositive). 'The assertion' berfungsi sebagai subjek kalimat utama 'The assertion ... was once considered heresy'.

structure.questionText: In no way _______ responsible for the catastrophic failure of the automated system.
structure.explanation: Frasa negatif 'In no way' di awal kalimat memicu inversi antara predikat (to be) dan subjek. 'are' mendahului subjek jamak 'the technicians'.

structure.questionText: The director demands that the lead actor _______ all his lines by the first dress rehearsal.
structure.explanation: Sesuai dengan aturan subjunctive setelah kata kerja keharusan (demands), klausa 'that' harus diisi dengan kata kerja dasar 'memorize' (tanpa 's') untuk subjek 'the lead actor'.

structure.questionText: _______ the complexity of the algorithm, the software runs with remarkable efficiency.
structure.explanation: 'Notwithstanding' berfungsi sebagai preposisi yang bersinonim dengan 'despite' atau 'in spite of', dan diikuti langsung oleh frasa kata benda 'the complexity...'. Ini menunjukkan kontras yang tepat.

structure.questionText: Never before _______ such a rapid escalation in global temperatures over a single decade.
structure.explanation: Frasa 'Never before' memaksa terjadinya inversi. Karena struktur aslinya adalah 'there has been' (existential 'there'), susunannya dibalik menjadi 'has there been'.

structure.questionText: _______ to withstand seismic activity, the bridge features a unique suspension system.
